package rulecoverage

func PositiveTimeNowInTightLoop() string {
    ruleID := "time_now_in_tight_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`time.Now()` called on every iteration of a tight inner loop"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
